name: Equinox Gold Corp.
description: Equinox Gold Corp. is a growth-focused Canadian mining company with a portfolio of eight operating gold mines and a clear path to achieve more than one million ounces of annual gold production. The company operates entirely in the Americas, with projects located in Brazil, Mexico, and the United States. Equinox Gold is committed to responsible mining practices and sustainable development while delivering value to its shareholders through production growth, exploration success, and the advancement of its development-stage assets.
